TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kaliyawan, title = Kaliyawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaliyawan} }

S.FORM: == Kaliyawan == u zuma a kamu nu Hulam: u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kaliyawan. u kasalumaluma' nu Kaliyawan sa, 1,751 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 4,493 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,266 ku tademaw, pakalatu 28%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3,227 ku tademaw, pakalatu 72%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 15%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 2%, Tayan(Tayal) 2%, Taluku(Truku) 6%, Kebalan(Kevalan) 2%, Paywan(Paiwan) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u tademaw nu Kabalan, u ziyazu' nu Kabalan i tiza i Sinchen. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini mueneng, caykatuud ku Sakizaya, uzuma a tademaw sa u Taluku Tayan atu Yuwatan, katuud ku Hulalm intini mueneng. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052) namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź Paykanatalay a pu Lumaluma'an a se kitakit kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan Yuancumincu weyuanhuy kitakit nalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan pulung sausi nalunasulitan
S.PHON: == kar~…ĺijawan == u zuma a kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu kar~…ĺijawan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kar~…ĺijawan sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, tar~…ĺuku(truku) *%, k…ôbar~…ĺan(k…ô*ar~…ĺan) *%, pajwan(paiwan) *%, zumazuma *%. u tad…ômaw nu kabar~…ĺan, u zijazu Ē~ ° nu kabar~…ĺan i tiza i sin ¶ńß…ôn. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, ¶ajkatuud ku sakizaja, uzuma a tad…ômaw sa u tar~…ĺuku tajan atu juwatan, katuud ku ńßur~…ĺar~…ĺm intini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * pajkanatar~…ĺaj a pu r~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a s…ô kitakit kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan juan ¶umin ¶u w…ôuanńßuj kitakit nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan pur~…ĺuŇč sausi nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan
S.FORM: == Kaliyawan == u zuma a kamu nu Hulam: u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kaliyawan. u kasalumaluma' nu Kaliyawan sa, 1,751 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 4,493 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,266 ku tademaw, pakalatu 28%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3,227 ku tademaw, pakalatu 72%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 15%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 2%, Tayan(Tayal) 2%, Taluku(Truku) 6%, Kebalan(Kevalan) 2%, Paywan(Paiwan) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u tademaw nu Kabalan, u ziyazu' nu Kabalan i tiza i Sinchen. u Sakizaya a tademaw izawtu ku Sakizaya itini mueneng, caykatuud ku Sakizaya, uzuma a tademaw sa u Taluku Tayan atu Yuwatan, katuud ku Hulalm intini mueneng. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052) namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź Paykanatalay a pu Lumaluma'an a se kitakit kalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan Yuancumincu weyuanhuy kitakit nalunasulitan atu palatuh calay-zazan pulung sausi nalunasulitan
S.PHON: == kar~…ĺijawan == u zuma a kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu kar~…ĺijawan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kar~…ĺijawan sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, tar~…ĺuku(truku) *%, k…ôbar~…ĺan(k…ô*ar~…ĺan) *%, pajwan(paiwan) *%, zumazuma *%. u tad…ômaw nu kabar~…ĺan, u zijazu Ē~ ° nu kabar~…ĺan i tiza i sin ¶ńß…ôn. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izawtu ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, ¶ajkatuud ku sakizaja, uzuma a tad…ômaw sa u tar~…ĺuku tajan atu juwatan, katuud ku ńßur~…ĺar~…ĺm intini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * pajkanatar~…ĺaj a pu r~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a s…ô kitakit kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan juan ¶umin ¶u w…ôuanńßuj kitakit nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan atu par~…ĺatuńß ¶ar~…ĺaj-zazan pur~…ĺuŇč sausi nar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan
